message:
Optimize GF256 with precomputed 64KB multiplication table

- Add const build_mul_tables() generating all 256x256 multiplication results
  at compile time, eliminating per-call table construction overhead
- Replace build_mul_table(log_c) with static MUL_TABLES[c] lookup, removing
  256-iteration loop from every gf256_mul_slice and gf256_addmul_slice call
- For slices >= MUL_TABLE_THRESHOLD (64 bytes), this trades 64KB binary size
  for near-zero table setup latency in RaptorQ encoding/decoding hot paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
